TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aicu ti tasi i-lin (inamirikan: Jolin Tsai; ciniukukan: ŤĒ°šĺĚśěó; 15 a qadaw na 9 a qiljas na 1980 a caviljan - na ) mavan a kisansemenay i taiwan, nalemedaw kemasi imaza i taihuku i sinzuang cy (tucu i śĖįŚĆóŚłāśĖįŤéäŚćÄ). na patagilj aza sengsengan itua senay nimadju kemasi 1999 a caviljan. napaveli anga paselaw 2,500 kuravan a rikudu nimadju i kacauan katjaivililj tua 2000 a cavilj patje tucu. namasan pazangal a kisansemenay itua kinasenayan na ciniukuan masa sinipukeljang azua rikudu nimadju liawliaw pakatua tjadjaljaw a senay katua ziyan italadj tua senay. ka 2021 a caviljan, aza sinan senay nimadju a rikudu pinaka"Ugly Beauty"(nguanguaq katua sekulung) na malap tua drusa a kazalan a ťáĎśõ≤Áćé a duqubi, izua tjaljananguaqan a caviljan a senay katua tjalja nanguaqan caviljan a rikudu. kipalikuzan ikiw rikudu "1019"(1999 a caviljan) "Don't Stop"(2000 a caviljan) "Show Your Love"(2000 a caviljan) "Lucky Number"(2001 a caviljan) "ÁúčśąĎ72Ťģä"(2003 a caviljan) "ŚüéŚ†°"(2004 a caviljan) "J-Game"(2005 a caviljan) "ŤąěŚ≠É"(2006 a caviljan) "ÁČĻŚčôJ"(2007 a caviljan) "ŤäĪŤĚīŤĚ∂"(2009 a caviljan) "Myself"(2010 a caviljan) "Muse"(2012 a caviljan) "ŚĎł"(2014 a caviljan) "Ugly Beauty"(2018 a caviljan) kazalan kinaqepuan a semenay J1šłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2004 a caviljan patje 2006 a caviljan) (kemasi 2006 a caviljan patje 2009 a caviljan) MyselfšłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2010 a caviljan patje 2013 a caviljan) PlayšłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2015 a caviljan patje 2016 a caviljan) Ugly BeautyšłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2019 a caviljan patje 2021 a caviljan) kuba timadju nalemindjelj aza kuba pinaka ŚáĆśôāŚ∑ģťü≥ś®ā kemasi 2009 a caviljan patje tucu. sunatj "19ś≠≤"(2000 a caviljan) "ŚĀáťĚĘŚÖ¨šłĽ¬∑ť®éŚ£ęÁ≤ĺÁ•ě"(2002 a caviljan) "JolinÁöĄ24Ś†āŤčĪśĖáśó•Ť®ėŤ™≤"(2005 a caviljan) "JolinÁöĄ6Ś†īŚĖģŚ≠óśīĺŚįć"(2005 a caviljan) "śĄõÁöĄÁ∑īÁŅíŤ™ě"(2008 a caviljan) "ť§äÁė¶"(2012 a caviljan == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: ai ¶u ti tasi i-…≠in (inamirikan: *u…≠in tsai; ¶iniukukan: ***; ** a qadaw na * a qi éas na **** a ¶avi éan - na ) mavan a kisans…ôm…ônaj i taiwan, na…≠…ôm…ôdaw k…ômasi imaza i taihuku i sinzuaŇč ¶j (tu ¶u i ******). na patagi é aza s…ôŇčs…ôŇčan itua s…ônaj nima…Ču k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan. napav…ô…≠i aŇča pas…ô…≠aw *,*** kuravan a rikudu nima…Ču i ka ¶auan ka ¶aivi…≠i é tua **** a ¶avi é pa ¶…ô tu ¶u. namasan pazaŇča…≠ a kisans…ôm…ônaj itua kinas…ônajan na ¶iniukuan masa sinipuk…ô éaŇč azua rikudu nima…Ču …≠iaw…≠iaw pakatua ¶a…Ča éaw a s…ônaj katua zijan ita…≠a…Č tua s…ônaj. ka **** a ¶avi éan, aza sinan s…ônaj nima…Ču a rikudu pinaka"ug…≠j b…ôautj"(ŇčuaŇčuaq katua s…ôku…≠uŇč) na ma…≠ap tua …Ėusa a kaza…≠an a *** a duqubi, izua ¶a éanaŇčuaqan a ¶avi éan a s…ônaj katua ¶a éa naŇčuaqan ¶avi éan a rikudu. kipa…≠ikuzan ikiw rikudu "****"(**** a ¶avi éan) "dun Ēt stup"(**** a ¶avi éan) "shuw juur …≠uv…ô"(**** a ¶avi éan) "…≠u ¶kj numb…ôr"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*****"(**** a ¶avi éan) "**"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*-gam…ô"(**** a ¶avi éan) "**"(**** a ¶avi éan) "***"(**** a ¶avi éan) "***"(**** a ¶avi éan) "mjs…ô…≠*"(**** a ¶avi éan) "mus…ô"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*"(**** a ¶avi éan) "ug…≠j b…ôautj"(**** a ¶avi éan) kaza…≠an kinaq…ôpuan a s…ôm…ônaj *********(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) (k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) mjs…ô…≠********(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) p…≠aj*******(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) ug…≠j b…ôautj*******(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) kuba tima…Ču na…≠…ômin…Č…ô é aza kuba pinaka ***** k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô tu ¶u. suna ¶ "***"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*********"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*u…≠in*********"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*u…≠in*******"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*****"(**** a ¶avi éan) "**"(**** a ¶avi éan == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: aicu ti tasi i-lin (inamirikan: Jolin Tsai; ciniukukan: ŤĒ°šĺĚśěó; 15 a qadaw na 9 a qiljas na 1980 a caviljan - na ) mavan a kisansemenay i taiwan, nalemedaw kemasi imaza i taihuku i sinzuang cy (tucu i śĖįŚĆóŚłāśĖįŤéäŚćÄ). na patagilj aza sengsengan itua senay nimadju kemasi 1999 a caviljan. napaveli anga paselaw 2,500 kuravan a rikudu nimadju i kacauan katjaivililj tua 2000 a cavilj patje tucu. namasan pazangal a kisansemenay itua kinasenayan na ciniukuan masa sinipukeljang azua rikudu nimadju liawliaw pakatua tjadjaljaw a senay katua ziyan italadj tua senay. ka 2021 a caviljan, aza sinan senay nimadju a rikudu pinaka"Ugly Beauty"(nguanguaq katua sekulung) na malap tua drusa a kazalan a ťáĎśõ≤Áćé a duqubi, izua tjaljananguaqan a caviljan a senay katua tjalja nanguaqan caviljan a rikudu. kipalikuzan ikiw rikudu "1019"(1999 a caviljan) "Don't Stop"(2000 a caviljan) "Show Your Love"(2000 a caviljan) "Lucky Number"(2001 a caviljan) "ÁúčśąĎ72Ťģä"(2003 a caviljan) "ŚüéŚ†°"(2004 a caviljan) "J-Game"(2005 a caviljan) "ŤąěŚ≠É"(2006 a caviljan) "ÁČĻŚčôJ"(2007 a caviljan) "ŤäĪŤĚīŤĚ∂"(2009 a caviljan) "Myself"(2010 a caviljan) "Muse"(2012 a caviljan) "ŚĎł"(2014 a caviljan) "Ugly Beauty"(2018 a caviljan) kazalan kinaqepuan a semenay J1šłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2004 a caviljan patje 2006 a caviljan) (kemasi 2006 a caviljan patje 2009 a caviljan) MyselfšłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2010 a caviljan patje 2013 a caviljan) PlayšłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2015 a caviljan patje 2016 a caviljan) Ugly BeautyšłĖÁēĆŚ∑°ŤŅīśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ(kemasi 2019 a caviljan patje 2021 a caviljan) kuba timadju nalemindjelj aza kuba pinaka ŚáĆśôāŚ∑ģťü≥ś®ā kemasi 2009 a caviljan patje tucu. sunatj "19ś≠≤"(2000 a caviljan) "ŚĀáťĚĘŚÖ¨šłĽ¬∑ť®éŚ£ęÁ≤ĺÁ•ě"(2002 a caviljan) "JolinÁöĄ24Ś†āŤčĪśĖáśó•Ť®ėŤ™≤"(2005 a caviljan) "JolinÁöĄ6Ś†īŚĖģŚ≠óśīĺŚįć"(2005 a caviljan) "śĄõÁöĄÁ∑īÁŅíŤ™ě"(2008 a caviljan) "ť§äÁė¶"(2012 a caviljan == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: ai ¶u ti tasi i-…≠in (inamirikan: *u…≠in tsai; ¶iniukukan: ***; ** a qadaw na * a qi éas na **** a ¶avi éan - na ) mavan a kisans…ôm…ônaj i taiwan, na…≠…ôm…ôdaw k…ômasi imaza i taihuku i sinzuaŇč ¶j (tu ¶u i ******). na patagi é aza s…ôŇčs…ôŇčan itua s…ônaj nima…Ču k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan. napav…ô…≠i aŇča pas…ô…≠aw *,*** kuravan a rikudu nima…Ču i ka ¶auan ka ¶aivi…≠i é tua **** a ¶avi é pa ¶…ô tu ¶u. namasan pazaŇča…≠ a kisans…ôm…ônaj itua kinas…ônajan na ¶iniukuan masa sinipuk…ô éaŇč azua rikudu nima…Ču …≠iaw…≠iaw pakatua ¶a…Ča éaw a s…ônaj katua zijan ita…≠a…Č tua s…ônaj. ka **** a ¶avi éan, aza sinan s…ônaj nima…Ču a rikudu pinaka"ug…≠j b…ôautj"(ŇčuaŇčuaq katua s…ôku…≠uŇč) na ma…≠ap tua …Ėusa a kaza…≠an a *** a duqubi, izua ¶a éanaŇčuaqan a ¶avi éan a s…ônaj katua ¶a éa naŇčuaqan ¶avi éan a rikudu. kipa…≠ikuzan ikiw rikudu "****"(**** a ¶avi éan) "dun Ēt stup"(**** a ¶avi éan) "shuw juur …≠uv…ô"(**** a ¶avi éan) "…≠u ¶kj numb…ôr"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*****"(**** a ¶avi éan) "**"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*-gam…ô"(**** a ¶avi éan) "**"(**** a ¶avi éan) "***"(**** a ¶avi éan) "***"(**** a ¶avi éan) "mjs…ô…≠*"(**** a ¶avi éan) "mus…ô"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*"(**** a ¶avi éan) "ug…≠j b…ôautj"(**** a ¶avi éan) kaza…≠an kinaq…ôpuan a s…ôm…ônaj *********(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) (k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) mjs…ô…≠********(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) p…≠aj*******(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) ug…≠j b…ôautj*******(k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô **** a ¶avi éan) kuba tima…Ču na…≠…ômin…Č…ô é aza kuba pinaka ***** k…ômasi **** a ¶avi éan pa ¶…ô tu ¶u. suna ¶ "***"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*********"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*u…≠in*********"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*u…≠in*******"(**** a ¶avi éan) "*****"(**** a ¶avi éan) "**"(**** a ¶avi éan == kaizuan ==
